subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The reply to thy written tablet hath been somewhat delayed by reason of manifold occupations and sorrows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و پیمان جواب لوح مسطور قدری تاخیر افتاد سبب مشاغل و احزان کثیر
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @education of children; moral education, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
